## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the change.
- [ ] `dotnet test DocRefract.slnx -c Release` passes.
- [ ] Serialized output is deterministic.
- [ ] Untrusted input remains bounded, escaped, and offline.
- [ ] Documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated when applicable.
- [ ] Added fixtures are synthetic or clearly redistributable.
